name: make-it-stick
display_name: Make It Stick: The Science of Successful Learning
description: 10 skills for evidence-based learning design, study system optimization, and training program auditing, extracted from Make It Stick: The Science of Successful Learning by Peter C. Brown, Henry L. Roediger III, and Mark A. McDaniel

source_book.title: Make It Stick: The Science of Successful Learning

skills.name: retrieval-practice-study-system
skills.description: Design a complete self-quizzing study system for any subject, course, or learning goal — covering quiz generation, Leitner box spacing, mastery signals, and anti-pattern comparisons.

skills.name: practice-schedule-designer
skills.description: Design a concrete practice schedule that makes learning stick — diagnosing massed practice, selecting strategy by goal type, and producing day-by-day calendars with tier-based interval management.

skills.name: learning-calibration-audit
skills.description: Diagnose and correct false confidence in learning mastery — identifying 7 cognitive distortions, prescribing matched calibration instruments, and designing dynamic testing cycles with gap classification.

skills.name: desirable-difficulty-classifier
skills.description: Classify any learning activity as a desirable difficulty (strengthens encoding) or undesirable difficulty (friction without benefit) — auditing for 6 named strategies and generating redesign recommendations.

skills.name: structured-reflection-protocol
skills.description: Run a structured reflection or debrief after any learning experience to turn raw experience into durable skill — using a 4-question protocol grounded in consolidation, retrieval, elaboration, and mental rehearsal.

skills.name: growth-mindset-and-deliberate-practice
skills.description: Diagnose fixed vs growth mindset patterns and design a deliberate practice protocol for expertise development — using Dweck's 4-quadrant model and Ericsson's 5 characteristics of deliberate practice.

skills.name: mnemonic-device-selector-and-builder
skills.description: Build a complete mnemonic device or memory palace for anything the user needs to memorize — covering simple devices (acronyms, peg, chunking) and complex devices (memory palace, method of loci).

skills.name: evidence-based-classroom-designer
skills.description: Design or redesign any course, class, or training session using evidence-based instructional principles — producing design audits, teacher protocols, quiz schedules, and syllabus inserts.

skills.name: evidence-based-training-designer
skills.description: Redesign a corporate training program so learning sticks past the session — applying Farmers Insurance, Jiffy Lube, and Andersen Windows models to convert massed-practice curricula into evidence-based architectures.

skills.name: learning-practice-auditor
skills.description: Audit any study habits, training program, or course design for ineffective learning practices — detecting 5 named anti-patterns with mechanism explanations, severity ratings, and routing to corrective skills.

edges.reason: Classroom designer uses retrieval practice protocols for quiz schedule and active learning design
Classroom designer uses practice scheduling for spacing and interleaving course content
Classroom designer audits activities against the 6 desirable difficulty strategies
Training designer uses practice scheduling to convert massed-practice curricula to interleaved architectures
Auditor routes rereading trap and massed practice findings to retrieval practice as corrective skill
Auditor routes difficulty-structure issues to desirable difficulty classifier for redesign
Auditor routes illusions of knowing findings to calibration audit for metacognitive correction

minimal.description: Entry point — retrieval practice study system and calibration audit for effective self-study

core.description: All 7 independent learning skills — full coverage for students, educators, and self-directed learners

full.description: Complete learning science toolkit including classroom design, training design, and practice auditing
